metrics_help.title: Turn Impact Score (TIP)
metrics_help.subtitle: How Much Did This Turn Change the Game?
metrics_help.body:
Turn Impact Score measures how much raw damage a player dealt on their turn, including combat, commander, and partner damage. Higher scores indicate explosive or decisive moments.

It is normalized across the whole game:

$TIP_t = \frac{\text{Damage}_t}{\sum_{i=1}^{n} \text{Damage}_i}$

metrics_help.title: Damage Entropy
metrics_help.subtitle: Sniper or Sweeper?
metrics_help.body:
Damage Entropy measures how focused or spread a player’s damage is across opponents.

- Low entropy (closer to 0): Player focused on a single target.
- High entropy (closer to 1): Damage spread across all opponents.

Calculated using Shannon entropy:

$H_t = -\sum p_i \log_2(p_i)$

Normalized by max entropy for 3 targets:

$\text{NormalizedEntropy}_t = \frac{H_t}{\log_2(3)}$

metrics_help.title: Commander Cast Detection
metrics_help.subtitle: Track When Commanders Hit the Field
metrics_help.body:
We infer whether a commander was cast on a turn by comparing the increase in commander tax. If it rises by 2 or more, we assume a cast occurred.

This helps flag tempo shifts and identifies when players are re-establishing board presence.

metrics_help.title: Turn Duration
metrics_help.subtitle: Time Management Per Turn
metrics_help.body:
Tracks how long each player spends on their turn. Can reveal pacing issues or highlight overthinkers.

Useful to visualize player flow and help identify points of friction.

Note: Results may be skewed if players forget to end their turn.

metrics_help.title: Kill Detection
metrics_help.subtitle: Spot the Eliminations
metrics_help.body:
If a player's life total drops from above 0 to 0 or below during a turn, that turn is flagged as an elimination turn.

These turns are often high-impact and can indicate critical power plays.
